message:
🐛 Remove version badge from agent status indicator (#335)

Remove the agent version badge (e.g. "vdev", "v0.3.6") from the
agent status dropdown. Users don't need to see the version in the
navbar indicator.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
